subject: Kikaonde

lesson.title: Kumvwa bakazhi amba “kechi nakonsheshe kwibakwasha ine.” Mwayila jishimikila, ino
topics: Bipimo byañingijilo byaketekelwa kubiwa: Bafunda bakumbule bulongo mepuzho apusana-
